title: Focused Nourishment
subtitle: Maximizing strength in small portions
description: At this stage, your capacity for food may be quite limited, and fatigue can feel more intense. Focusing on very small, nutrient-dense meals and consistent hydration can help support your energy and overall comfort.
what_to_expect: Very limited capacity for large meals
Need for minimal but frequent nourishment
nutrition_focus: Eat very small, frequent meals throughout the day
Maintain steady hydration with small sips
recommended_foods: Small portions of dal, soft roti, rice, and light sabzi
Fruits like banana, apple, orange, and pomegranate
Soft vegetables like spinach, pumpkin, carrots, and beans
Easy snacks like curd, smoothies, nuts, or fruit bowls
Protein and calcium sources like milk, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
hydration: Drink water in small, frequent sips
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, lemon water, or light soups
reassurance: Even small amounts of nutrient-rich food can support your body effectively.

diabetes.personalized_description: Very small, frequent meals help maintain stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils, paneer, and nuts
diabetes.reassurance: Frequent, balanced intake supports steady energy.

anemia.personalized_description: Iron-rich foods in small portions support energy and help manage fatigue.
nutrition_focus: Include iron-rich foods in small portions
Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals

hypertension.personalized_description: Small, balanced meals and hydration support stable blood pressure.
hypertension.reassurance: Consistent routines support a calm and steady state.

thyroid.personalized_description: Small, consistent meals support metabolic balance and steady energy.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, focusing on very small, frequent, and nutrient-dense meals helps maintain energy and stability.
priority_nutrition: Eat very small and frequent meals
Stay well hydrated throughout the day
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Gentle and consistent nourishment supports your overall well-being.
